description: Goroutine safety comment indicates potential data race issues when mutating Echo instance fields after server start, but no runtime protection is implemented.
suggested_fix: Consider adding runtime checks or making the Echo struct immutable after Start() is called.

description: DefaultHTTPErrorHandler exposes error details when exposeError=true, which could leak sensitive information in production.
suggested_fix: Add a production mode flag or sanitize error messages before exposing them to clients.

description: New() creates a new slog.Logger on every call, which could be expensive if called frequently.
suggested_fix: Consider lazy initialization or allow logger injection to avoid unnecessary logger creation.

description: DefaultHTTPErrorHandler swallows errors when response is already committed, which could hide important error information.
suggested_fix: Log swallowed errors even when response is committed for better debugging.

description: Add() method panics on error, which is not ideal for library code that should handle errors gracefully.
suggested_fix: Return error instead of panicking, or provide both panicking and non-panicking variants.

description: Reset() method sets c.store to nil, which could cause memory leaks if there are references to the old map.
suggested_fix: Clear the map instead of setting to nil, or ensure all references are properly cleaned up.

description: RealIP() method trusts proxy headers by default without validation, making it vulnerable to IP spoofing attacks.
suggested_fix: Add configuration to validate/trust proxy headers and provide secure defaults.

description: FormFile() and FormFiles() methods parse multipart form on every call, which could be expensive.
suggested_fix: Cache parsed form data or provide a way to parse once and reuse.

description: Router interface doesn't specify thread-safety guarantees, which could lead to race conditions when routes are modified during request handling.
suggested_fix: Document thread-safety guarantees and consider adding synchronization for route modifications.

description: Route tree structure could benefit from optimization for high-cardinality path parameter scenarios.
suggested_fix: Consider benchmarking and optimizing the radix tree implementation for parameter-heavy routes.

description: BasicAuthValidator documentation warns about timing attacks but doesn't enforce constant-time comparison, leaving implementations vulnerable.
suggested_fix: Provide a secure default validator implementation or enforce constant-time comparison in the middleware.
